content:
@Johannes D are you interested in joining tech hours some day (@Oliver Bertuch too, of course) to talk about the Bulk Metadata and Citation Export for Multiple Datasets and Datafiles doc you created for #11892.

Usually we meet at 3pm on Tuesdays but I just checked with the team and people seem ok with an earlier time to better accommodate your timezone. :heart:
I'm on the road this week. Would it be possible next week?
I don't see why not. Let me ping @Gustavo Durand
